name: RMW - SVD
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - The SVD is while not an AK but sniper, instead it's its own System, made with the soldiers already familiar with the AK ergonomics in mind. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
